name: remote-build
description: Demonstrates remote dispatch and worker-pool affinity — requires at least one real carina-worker process registered before this run will complete: `carina-worker --gateway <url> --gateway-token-file <path> --executor <program> --pool gpu-heavy` (or `carina worker register my-worker remote --pool gpu-heavy` for a worker you run some other way). Without a matching worker, the "train" step's dispatched task sits queued until the run's timeout. See docs/guides/agent-swarm-workflows.md#remote-dispatch.

steps.task: Summarize the current build/training configuration in this workspace.

Run the GPU training/build job described by:
${prepare}
